steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Expo SDK 54 + RN 0.81 프로젝트 초기화, 의존성 설치(NativeWind v4, TanStack Query, STOMP, react-navigation v7), src/ 디렉토리 구조 생성(navigation/screens/lib/hooks/types), App.tsx(QueryClientProvider+NavigationContainer+RootNavigator) 완성. npm test + lint + expo export 모두 통과.

steps.name: auth-flow
steps.summary: AuthProvider+useAuth Context(useAuth.tsx), secure-storage(userId/role/WHEN_UNLOCKED), apiFetch with error handling, LoginScreen/SignupScreen 구현, AppNavigator(Chat탭+헤더), jest.setup.js(expo winter globals), 6개 테스트 통과(npm test+lint 모두 clean).

steps.name: backend-mobile-support-and-api-layer
steps.summary: SecurityConfig CORS bean 추가(/ws-native 이미 존재), types/api.ts 전 도메인 *Response 타입 정비(backend DTO 1:1 대응), query-client.ts 추출, 도메인 훅 6개 생성(useRequests/useMatches/useChat/usePayment/useReview/useGuide), api-client.test.ts 추가. mobile: 11 tests passed, lint clean. backend: 컴파일 성공, 6개 pre-existing 테스트 실패(Docker/Spring 컨텍스트 이슈, 변경 전후 동일).

steps.name: traveler-screens
steps.summary: LocationMap(OSM UrlTile+expo-location GPS), RequestForm(유형/설명/시각/시간/금액), GuideOfferCard(별점/확정버튼), ReviewForm(별점/코멘트), TravelerScreen(요청없음→지도+Modal폼/OPEN→오퍼목록/MATCHED→채팅+결제자리/COMPLETED→리뷰자리), ChatScreen(매칭확정 후 채팅방 플레이스홀더). npm test 18 passed, lint clean.
